stemHtml: A flight leg of 90 NM is planned from A to B via an intermediate point C overhead a railway intersection. The planned heading is 037⁰T and the planned GS is 135 kt. After 12 minutes the pilot notices that he/she is 3 NM ahead and 3NM left of the railway intersection, instead of 1 NM right, as expected. Find the required heading to reach at B.
